பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.விவரங்கள்: There are twelve months in a year. The year starts with January and ends with December. The sequence: January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, and December.

Day: Characterized by the sun, blue sky, clouds, birds flying, and flowers like sunflowers. Animals like the rooster are active. Night: Characterized by the moon, stars, and artificial light. Nocturnal animals like the bat and owl are active.

பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.தலைப்பு: 3. Harini’s Happy Week (Days of the Week)
பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.விவரங்கள்: Sunday: Met friend Kani. Monday: Father gave a cute puppy. Tuesday: New teacher told stories. Wednesday: Saw a pink rose. Thursday: Drew a picture. Friday: Hen had five yellow chicks. Saturday: Sang songs inside when it rained.
'ph' sound: photo, phone, dolphin, graph. 'th' sound: thumb, moth, mouth, thing, thin, thick. 'ng' sound: ring, king, song, wing, sing, sang.

Morning: Rooster crows, Grandpa walks, reading a book. Afternoon: Singing songs and having lunch. Evening: Playing with friends, helping parents, going to the market. Night: Having dinner, brushing teeth, and going to bed.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: How many months are mentioned in the poem "Months in a Year"?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: There are twelve months in a year as mentioned in the lesson.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which month marks the end of the year?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The year starts with January and ends with December.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Name three things you see in the sky during the Day.
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: During the day, we see the sun, blue sky, clouds, and birds flying.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which two nocturnal animals are shown in the Night scene?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Bats and Owls are nocturnal animals that are active at night.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What is the name of Harini’s friend?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Harini met her friend Kani on Sunday.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: On which day did Harini’s father give her a puppy?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: On Monday, Harini's father gave her a cute puppy.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What happened in Harini's class on Tuesday?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: On Tuesday, a new teacher came to class and told many stories.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What did Harini see in her garden on Wednesday?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Harini saw a pink rose in her garden on Wednesday.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which day of the week comes after Thursday?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The day following Thursday is Friday.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: How many chicks did Harini's hen have on Friday?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Harini's hen had five yellow chicks on Friday.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What did Harini and her friend do on Saturday when it rained?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: When it rained on Saturday, they stayed inside and sang songs.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Give an example of a word using the 'ph' sound.
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: 'Photo' is an example of a word using the 'ph' blending sound.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which part of the body starting with 'th' is mentioned in phonics?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The word 'thumb' starts with the 'th' sound.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Identify a word that ends with the 'ng' sound.
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The word 'king' ends with the 'ng' blending sound.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: According to the daily routine, when does the rooster crow?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The rooster crows in the morning to wake everyone up.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What activity does Grandpa do in the morning?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: In the morning routine, Grandpa is shown taking a walk.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: In which part of the day do the children have lunch?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Lunch is typically eaten during the afternoon.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Name one thing Harini does to help her parents in the evening.
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Helping parents and going to the market are evening activities.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What should you do before going to bed at night?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Brushing teeth is part of the night routine before going to bed.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which day of the week is considered the first day in Harini's week story?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Harini's happy week starts with Sunday when she meets her friend Kani.
